name: Pdf Attachments from Emails
description: This node reads emails and download Pdf Attachments from all provided email addresses

fields.name: subjectFilter
fields.title: Filter By Subject
fields.description: Filter emails with attachments based on the subject.(Optional)

fields.name: attachmentsDir
fields.title: Save Attachments To Path
fields.description: Directory path to save the downloaded attachments.

fields.name: top
fields.title: Top
fields.description: Number of most recent Emails to Fetch

fields.name: emailAddressList
fields.title: Email Address List
fields.description: List of email addresses separated by commas or semicolon. Attachments will be fetched from these emails.
